headline: Saturday discipline breaks the emotional snacking cycle—act today
summary: You're gaining 0.06 kg weekly when you need to lose 0.68 kg—today's eating choices and exercise must reverse this trajectory now.
details: Lock in Huel for breakfast and lunch to eliminate portion guessing and snacking triggers; emotional eating has added 0.2 kg this month alone. Put 55 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill this afternoon—movement is non-negotiable today. Saturday is your weak point and your leverage: what you choose right now determines if next week shifts positive or stays trapped in gain.
